relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains salary credit transaction data from Accounts to Credit department, while the outbound file contains loan repayment schedule data from Credit to Customer Services. These represent fundamentally different business processes: salary payments versus loan repayment schedules. There is minimal field overlap (only currency and timestamp concepts), and the outbound file's structure (loan terms, amortization schedules, interest calculations) cannot be reasonably derived from salary credit transaction data.
